forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle between 3am and 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 53. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 65, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

weather_report:
The early hours shroud Downtown San Francisco in a gentle haze, with whispers of drizzle anticipated in the dark stillness before dawn breaks. As the night lingers, the temperature hovers at a comfortable level, inviting a light wrap or hoodie for those braving the cool midnight air. Come Tuesday, the skies will transform; the clouds will part, revealing a cheerful expanse of sunlight that bathes the city. With temperatures nudging up to a pleasant 65 degrees, the day promises a mellow warmth, perfect for a stroll along the waterfront or a leisurely afternoon in a local café.

Though the coastal fog might still cling to the edges of the Golden Gate, expect the day to progressively clear, lending any viewpoints a lovely clarity. A stroll through the Historic Ferry Building, showcasing artisanal vendors and food stalls, or a visit to Golden Gate Park’s tranquil gardens could be delightful ways to spend your time. Dressing in layers will serve well today—perhaps a light shirt combined with a cozy cardigan for the dawn chill and afternoon sun. Today, as in San Francisco’s very essence, one finds juxtaposition—of light and shadow, warmth and coolness—each offering a unique charm woven into the city’s tapestry.
